markdownRemark.html:
At Sāvatthī.

“Mendicants, sentient beings come together and converge because of an element: the imprudent with the imprudent … uneducated … witless … prudent… educated… wise…

imprudent … lazy … witless … prudent…

imprudent … unmindful … witless … prudent…”

SN.14.21. Appassutamūlaka Sutta (“Beginning With the Uneducated”)
